name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Flagship skill-development programme that provides industry-relevant training and certification through approved training partners.

benefit.amount: Training fees funded for eligible candidates
benefit.description: Provides short-term skill training, assessment, and certification in courses available under the current PMKVY framework.

other_conditions: Eligibility varies by job role, training centre, and current PMKVY guidelines.

benefits.financial: Training fees funded for eligible candidates

ai_metadata.estimated_processing_time: Depends on course and training-centre availability

ai_explanation.summary: Job-role training and certification for candidates seeking employable skills.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Choose a current course and verify its entry requirements with an approved training provider.
tips: Compare course duration, job role, and training-centre location before enrolling.
next_steps: Search current courses on the official portal.
Register with an approved training provider.

source.organization: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

name: National Career Service
description: National employment platform offering job matching, career counselling, job fairs, and labour-market information to job seekers and employers.

benefit.description: Free access to job listings, career guidance, counselling, and employment-related services on the official platform.

ai_explanation.summary: Official job-search and career-guidance support for job seekers.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Create a complete, accurate jobseeker profile and review matching vacancies.
common_rejection_reasons: Qualification mismatch for a selected vacancy
tips: Keep qualifications, location preferences, and contact details up to date.
next_steps: Complete your profile and search vacancies.
